textByHash.662c4c198969a1e21fde2a6064aa0a04f99a265b: Come over here, I'll bite your leg off!
textByHash.a5ca3174036f47c6a7b234a61d36af8851963de6: Your mother was a jackal, and your father smelt of cactuses!
textByHash.ad2ca39816144457ba9abcba2495a6d4ab19bb8d: Prepare to die, you two-legged combat wrangler!
